title: President and Vice President Both Simultaneously Incapacitated

bottlenecks.summary: Vice President is also incapacitated and cannot assume the Acting Presidency under Article III Section 12.2.

satisfied_duties.duty: assume the Acting Presidency under the constitutional succession order
satisfied_duties.outcome: assumed the Acting Presidency subject to the succession limits of Article III Section 12.4

failed_duties.duty: assume the Acting Presidency upon presidential incapacity
failed_duties.outcome: Vice President is also incapacitated and cannot assume the Acting Presidency under Article III Section 12.2.

ai_summary.primary_bottleneck: Vice President is also incapacitated and cannot assume the Acting Presidency under Article III Section 12.2.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
